mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsPblancApplyTaskPartcptsDao.select */ select apply_id , partcpts_id , partcpts_nm , chrg_realm_nm , enc_mbtlnum , enc_brthdy , partcptn_rate , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task_partcpts where apply_id = #{applyId} and partcpts_id = #{partcptsId}

/** UsptBsnsPblancApplyTaskPartcptsDao.selectList */ select apply_id , partcpts_id , partcpts_nm , chrg_realm_nm , enc_mbtlnum , enc_brthdy , partcptn_rate from uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task_partcpts where apply_id = #{applyId}
